creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Sorry for the late response. I've overseen that you have responded :-(

The error seems to have been overcome by events now. It doens't appear on CURRENT (r325989) anymore.

Therefore, I face another error with GRASS7 in the very last phase of installation, see below. I will opne another PR and close this one for completeness.

Regards,

Oliver


[...]
install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/graphics/qgis/work/QGIS-final-2_18_12/debian/qgis-icon512x512.png  /usr/ports/graphics/qgis/work/stage/usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/512x512/apps/qgis.png
